# PERF-84 positive: db.Beginx opens a transaction inside a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-084-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func UpdateUser(c echo.Context, db *sqlx.DB) error {
	tx, err := db.Beginx()
	if err != nil {
		return c.String(500, "err")
	}
	if _, err := tx.Exec("UPDATE users SET name = ? WHERE id = ?", "x", 1); err != nil {
		_ = tx.Rollback()
		return c.String(500, "err")
	}
	if err := tx.Commit(); err != nil {
		return c.String(500, "err")
	}
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}
